heading: Countersignature of certificate of election
label: 1b Countersignature of certificate of election
text: The certificate mentioned in shall be countersigned by the secretary of state of the State.section 1a of this title
notes: CodificationR.S. § 19 derived from , .act July 25, 1866, ch. 245, § 314 Stat. 244
